assessor_1_raw: Card fraud detection: the design is well-constructed with appropriate temporal split and chargeback-confirmed labels. Precision at fixed recall primary metric aligns with business objective. Both models receive equivalent tuning effort. Comprehensive ablation suite. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Sound fraud detection experiment. Bidirectional LSTM/Transformer on historical sequences doesn't access future information. Merchant embedding ablation is an excellent confound control. SHAP interpretability addresses fraud system explainability requirements. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses chargeback-confirmed labels and temporal split. The augmented baseline ablation is a key diagnostic for feature vs. architecture advantage. OOD account analysis is appropriate (pre-registration of definition needed in practice). No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
